headline: Pelosi discloses bullish options bets on Intel and Uber
summary: The filing shows two separate option purchases, both carrying a $50 strike price and a March 19, 2027 expiration date. The Intel position consists of 200 call options valued between $1,000,001 and $5,000,000, while the Uber position covers 200 call options valued between $500,001 and $1,000,000. Both transactions are classified as new purchases, not amendments to prior disclosures.

Both transactions are classified as new purchases, not amendments to prior disclosures.

headline: Serve Robotics Appoints Andreas Lieber to Board of Directors
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Serve Robotics Inc. (Nasdaq: SERV), a leading autonomous robotics company, today announced the appointment of Andreas Lieber to the company’s Board of Directors, effective June 22, 2026. Mr. Lieber will replace Sarfraz Maredia, Global Head of Autonomous Mobility & Delivery at Uber, who is stepping down after serving three years on Serve's Board. Andreas Lieber brings deep experience scaling technology and logistics businesses across Uber, Postmate

headline: Uber Eats Adds New U.S. Retailers, Expanding Selection Across Beauty, Office Supplies, Sporting Goods, and More
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 24, 2026--Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) today announced the addition of several new retailers to the Uber Eats marketplace, broadening its retail selection available for on-demand delivery. Consumers can now shop for products from Kiehl’s, FedEx Office, Blick Art Materials, Academy Sports + Outdoors, and Choice Pet through the Uber Eats, Uber, and Postmates apps.

headline: Race for robotaxi market arrives in London
summary: Bristling with sensors and electronic eyes, robotaxis are appearing on London's streets, slipping silently between red buses and black cabs, as companies battle to lead Europe's emerging autonomous vehicle market.McNamara said robotaxis will ultimately become "a tourist attraction", adding that autonomous vehicles tend to wait until roads are completely clear before pulling out.
